sys_script_fix.description:
STRY0137218 - Fix Script for Action Log - Call upate on all rows to fire the rule that sets the Comment Type
Active Tasks - for all active tasks - If there is a Response Comment - add an Action log with the type Response Comment - If there is a Reviewer Comment - add an Action log with the type Reviewer Comment - If there is a Rework Comment - add an Action log with the type Rework Comment - At this point, there is no easy way to add the reopen action log entries
sys_script_fix.name: 2.8.1 - Fix Script - Action Log - Update
